source.limitations: Educational summary — not regulatory or legal authority

records.title: Content Disarm and Reconstruction
records.text: CDR removes active content from files while preserving safe structure for analysis.

records.title: Model Context Protocol
records.text: MCP standardizes how applications expose tools and resources to language models with explicit descriptors.

records.title: Prompt Injection
records.text: Prompt injection embeds adversarial instructions in intake to manipulate model behavior.

records.title: Technical Standards
records.text: Technical standards are versioned documents defining procedures within a declared domain.

records.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
records.text: RAG retrieves external material at inference time. Retrieval alone is not reasoning or closure.

records.title: Regulatory Compliance
records.text: Regulatory compliance depends on jurisdiction, effective dates, and applicable rule scope.
